title: teucrium cylindricum var. decalvans
intro: Teucrium cylindricum var. decalvans, also known as mountain tea or labiatae, is a plant species belonging to the genus Teucrium and the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Teucrium cylindricum var. decalvans include its ability to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions or for general well-being.
